name: Hilton Honors American Express Surpass® Card
effective_cost: Low if you spend $200+/yr at Hilton

verdict.text: Fee pays for itself with modest Hilton spend

earn_note: Strong middle-tier earning — 12× at Hilton and a 3× catch-all beats most no-fee cards outright. Sits between the free Hilton Honors card and the $550 Aspire.

points.note: Same Hilton Honors currency as the free card and the Aspire — the Surpass earns it faster and adds Gold status, without the Aspire's resort credit or free night.

transfer_partners.highlight: 26 airline transfer partners, almost all at a poor 10:1 ratio — Hilton points are built to be spent on hotel stays, not transferred out.
transfer_partners.recent_changes: No confirmed recent changes to the airline transfer chart.

credits.name: Hilton Resort/Purchase Credit
credits.subtitle: $50/quarter
credits.description: Up to $50 in statement credits each quarter on eligible Hilton purchases.
tips: By itself, this credit covers the $150 annual fee if you spend $200/yr at Hilton — the lowest bar of any credit in this dashboard.

credits.name: Free Night Reward
credits.subtitle: after $15,000/yr spend
credits.description: One free night reward earned after spending $15,000 on the card in a calendar year.
tips: A high spend threshold for a $150-fee card — don't count this unless you're already going to hit $15,000/yr.

protection_note: No trip cancellation, trip delay, or emergency medical/evacuation coverage — those start at the Aspire tier. This card's value is in earning and status, not trip protection.
rental_note: Secondary only — put rentals on a card with primary coverage if you rent often.

status_perks.name: Hilton Honors Gold Status
status_perks.note: Complimentary with the card — space-available room upgrades, 80% bonus points on stays, and executive lounge access at select properties. Upgrades to Diamond if you spend $40,000/yr on the card.

services.name: Global Assist Hotline
services.detail: 24/7 emergency coordination when traveling 100+ miles from home (cardholder pays for any services rendered).

services.name: No foreign transaction fees
services.detail: Zero FX fees on international spend.

additional_cards.title: Additional cards

benefits.text: Earns Hilton Honors points on their spend (into your account)
Does not get their own Gold status or resort credit independently

additional_cards.note: Additional cards are free — an easy way to pool household spend toward the 12× hotel rate and the $40,000 Diamond-status threshold.
